organization: International finance think tank; business development mandate: (1) bringing capital to Africa, (2) long-term sustainable development in any sector, (3) human capital programs. Delivery strengths: research & policy analysis, technical assistance, curriculum & training design, ToT, evaluation/MEL, convening of institutional investors and capital.

dimensions.question: How squarely does the opportunity's subject sit inside the three mandate lanes?
Is the work being asked for something this organization actually does well (research, TA, curriculum/ToT, evaluation, convening)?
Can this organization apply as-is: org type, geography, registration, consortium requirements? (Also emit the eligible flag.)
Award size and strategic value versus proposal burden and process weight.

eligible_flag_rules: Y = clearly org-eligible; N = hard gate (individuals-only, local-grassroots-only, for-profits-only, wrong geography); ? = unclear, verify
output_contract: Return ONLY JSON: {"mandate_fit":int,"delivery_fit":int,"eligibility_access":int,"value_effort":int,"eligible":"Y|N|?","rationales":{"mandate_fit":str,"delivery_fit":str,"eligibility_access":str,"value_effort":str}} - one sentence per rationale, integers 0-100, no other keys, no prose outside the JSON.

anchors.title: Design & delivery of a Central Banking Academy for a national financial-studies institute (donor-funded; curriculum, materials, ToT, pilot, sustainability)
anchors.why: Human capital + financial sector core; the exact delivery chain; standard org eligibility; large award but heavy full-proposal process.

anchors.title: EUR 100-300K fund for SGB capacity building plus short-term skilling and training with private sector to guarantee employment, Ethiopia/South Africa/Uganda
anchors.why: Human capital + employment in target geographies; training design fits, direct placement delivery less so.

anchors.title: EUR 50K-4M rolling fund for evidence-based innovations addressing poverty and inequality from low- and middle-income countries
anchors.why: Sustainable development core; evidence orientation suits a think tank; rolling staged process is light relative to size.

anchors.title: Rolling grants for continuously updated living literature reviews on policymaking topics
anchors.why: Research synthesis is the organization's native craft; topic breadth only partially Africa/capital-focused.

anchors.title: $250K global prize for organizations creating social and economic impact (application-based)
anchors.why: Broad thematic overlap but recognizes existing programs rather than commissioning think-tank work.

anchors.title: GBP 7-18K small grants for individual nature-conservation fieldwork projects in developing countries
anchors.why: Broadly sustainable development but field conservation is outside delivery strengths; tiny award.
